title: Possible key error in ModelLoader
issue_summary: Loading a decoder-only transformer checkpoint failed because the loader expected fused qkv_projection parameters that were not mapped from the checkpoint layout being converted.

root_cause.summary: The loader did not correctly translate source checkpoint attention weights into the fused qkv_projection format expected by the target model.
root_cause.basis: issue report and linked fix PR

symptom: state_dict loading raises missing-key errors for qkv_projection and related attention projection parameters.

local_reproduction.mapping: The local case builds a checkpoint with split q, k, and v weights, lets the buggy loader search for a fused qkv_projection key directly, and then fixes the mapping by explicitly fusing those weights.

issue_contract.trigger: Load a checkpoint with split q, k, and v weights into a model expecting fused qkv projection weights.
issue_contract.mechanism: The buggy loader fails to fuse and remap the split projection tensors into qkv_projection.
issue_contract.observable_symptom: The load path reports missing qkv projection keys.

reproduction_scope.mechanism_level_claim: This case reproduces the faulty checkpoint-to-model mapping for fused qkv projections.
reproduction_scope.issue_level_observable_claim: This case reproduces the reported missing-key load failure for qkv_projection parameters.
